→ SCENARIO?

"Since I was young, I had a life predetermined for me." Itoshi Sae is the current boss of the yakuza infamously known as Itoshi-kai. While he had no 'relevant' issues since he became the boss, the increasing vigilance of the police in his territory puts a wrinkle in his plan to squash those who oppose him thoroughly. You were called upon to serve him.
